name: Mum talking about me coming home
transcript: 弟弟妈妈你这次回来齁我还在快回来了我明天去把你房间卫生做一下然后你回来我这次要煮一个好吃的排骨那个很好吃我跟爸爸说一定要记住提醒我
translation: Brother, mother, you're back this time, I'm still coming back soon, I'll go do your room hygiene tomorrow, and then you come back, I'll cook a delicious pork rib this time
title: Mum talking about me coming home

name: Bank story
transcript: 你的银行尚为你转了一份email过来给爸爸你是5月8号到期你给银行他写一个Email给你说是一年99
translation: Your bank has also forwarded an email to Dad for you. You are due on May 8. You write an email to the bank saying it is 99 a year.
title: Bank story

name: Birthday message
transcript: 弟弟生日快乐慢慢爱你爱你爱你爱你宝贝慢慢爱你
translation: Happy Birthday Brother Love You Slowly Love You Love You Baby Slowly Love You
title: Birthday message
